verdict.answer_first: A states the immediate action in sentence 1: "Start by making the error observable"; B is also direct but opens with framing before "Get the actual exception first".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder to one first move: "Concretely, the first move: Log the actual exception"; B gives an ordered checklist and then "first two moves".
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it gives concrete next actions: "Pull up the grouped stack trace(s)" and "Plot the 500 rate per host/instance".
